prompt: Hotel comparison report for the Martinez/Chen wedding (Oct 9-11 2026, The Olde Pink House, Savannah) from two pasted hotel offers: The DeSoto Savannah and Hyatt Regency Savannah.
assertions: Output is a valid .docx that opens without errors
Every blank spacer paragraph is exactly 6pt or 10pt — no 10.5pt or default-size blank paragraphs anywhere
All body paragraphs have space before = 0 and space after = 0 (except the 14pt-after dates line)
Both rate tables fit within the usable page width and the Offered Rate column is shaded gray (D9D9D9)
TripAdvisor ranking lines use exactly the format '#X of Y Hotels in Savannah' and are hyperlinked to the TripAdvisor URLs provided
Divider lines between hotel sections use the thinThickThinMediumGap paragraph border with exactly one 10pt spacer before and after
The JC Room Blocks contact line appears exactly once, as the last paragraph of the document
Rate data is accurate: DeSoto Deluxe King $249/$419 and Hyatt City View King $209/$359 appear in the tables
